mapper.select: SELECT o.*, oi.id as item_id, oi.product_id as item_product_id, oi.sku_id as item_sku_id, oi.product_name as item_product_name, oi.product_image as item_product_image, oi.price as item_price, oi.quantity as item_quantity, oi.total_amount as item_total_amount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, oi.id as item_id, oi.product_id as item_product_id, oi.sku_id as item_sku_id, oi.product_name as item_product_name, oi.product_image as item_product_image, oi.price as item_price, oi.quantity as item_quantity, oi.total_amount as item_total_amount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.*, oi.id as item_id, oi.product_id as item_product_id, oi.sku_id as item_sku_id, oi.product_name as item_product_name, oi.product_image as item_product_image, oi.price as item_price, oi.quantity as item_quantity, oi.total_amount as item_total_amount FROM ( SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(user_id, order_no, total_amount, pay_amount, status, address_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{addressId}, NOW(), NOW())
